title: 9ft Foil Glitz Blue & Silver 40th Birthday Banner
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES: 1 prismatic blue birthday foil banner.108".
ATTRACTIVE DESIGN: Create an eye-catching party room decoration with this foil banner.
PERFECT FOR BIRTHDAY: This banner is ideal for 40th birthday party and matches them with other party supplies and decorations.
DURABLE QUALITY: This banner is made of durable foil that is strong enough to reuse for the next party.
EASY TO USE: This banner is easy to assemble and easy to use, just simply hang this on the wall and it will surely create a fantastic party decoration.
description: From the manufacturer Blue Glitz Add-On Items Add a touch of glitz and glamour to your Birthday Party and dazzle your guests with these simple and elegant designs!
